SubLayerProcessing.SqlScript:
select 
 ClientID
,FileID
,LoadDateTime
,FileLayoutID
,FileLayoutDescription
,PlanMemberID
,GenderCode
,MemberAge
,RiskAdjustmentFactorTypeCode
,MedicaidIndicator
,OREC
,MedicaidDualStatusCode
,Hospice
,ESRD
,IsLatest
,DemographicRiskAdjustmentFactor
,ProgramYear
,ProgramYearMonth
from
(select *, rank() over(partition by PlanmemberID, Programyear, ProgramYearMonth order by FileID desc) as rownum
 from cDemographicsRiskScore
 ) where rownum=1
SubLayerProcessing.DupScript:
select 1
from tempSQLScript
group by PlanmemberID, Programyear, ProgramYearMonth
having count(*) > 1
SubLayerProcessing.MergeScript:
MERGE INTO DestinationTable t
USING (SELECT * from tempSQLScript) s 
ON s.PlanmemberID = t.PlanmemberID AND s.Programyear = t.Programyear AND s.ProgramYearMonth = t.ProgramYearMonth
WHEN MATCHED THEN 
UPDATE SET
 ClientID = s.ClientID
,FileID = s.FileID
,LoadDateTime = s.LoadDateTime
,FileLayoutID = s.FileLayoutID
,FileLayoutDescription = s.FileLayoutDescription
,PlanMemberID = s.PlanMemberID
,GenderCode = s.GenderCode
,MemberAge = s.MemberAge
,RiskAdjustmentFactorTypeCode = s.RiskAdjustmentFactorTypeCode
,MedicaidIndicator = s.MedicaidIndicator
,OREC = s.OREC
,MedicaidDualStatusCode = s.MedicaidDualStatusCode
,Hospice = s.Hospice
,ESRD = s.ESRD
,IsLatest = s.IsLatest
,DemographicRiskAdjustmentFactor = s.DemographicRiskAdjustmentFactor
,ProgramYear = s.ProgramYear
,ProgramYearMonth = s.ProgramYearMonth
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN 
INSERT 
(
 ClientID
,FileID
,LoadDateTime
,FileLayoutID
,FileLayoutDescription
,PlanMemberID
,GenderCode
,MemberAge
,RiskAdjustmentFactorTypeCode
,MedicaidIndicator
,OREC
,MedicaidDualStatusCode
,Hospice
,ESRD
,IsLatest
,DemographicRiskAdjustmentFactor
,ProgramYear
,ProgramYearMonth
)
VALUES
(
 s.ClientID
,s.FileID
,s.LoadDateTime
,s.FileLayoutID
,s.FileLayoutDescription
,s.PlanMemberID
,s.GenderCode
,s.MemberAge
,s.RiskAdjustmentFactorTypeCode
,s.MedicaidIndicator
,s.OREC
,s.MedicaidDualStatusCode
,s.Hospice
,s.ESRD
,s.IsLatest
,s.DemographicRiskAdjustmentFactor
,s.ProgramYear
,s.ProgramYearMonth
)
